历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 2348 → 6432 → 3596 → 5122 → 10774, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend. The significant decline in 2025 was mainly due to the (504) group (with re-selected ideological and political) niche majors, while mainstream groups (503 group with re-selected chemistry, 501 group with no re-selection restrictions) ranked around 5000–5400. The 2025 baseline is about 10774; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi for Science/Physics Category: 52 in 2021, 59 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 47 in 2024, 46 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 50, an increase of about 8.7% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 19th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings main list, with stable rankings in the 13–19 range in recent years, belonging to the top normal comprehensive university in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving responses to school management public opinion, with no major negative incidents; Douyin popularity ranking 37th (relatively hot), with medium short video exposure; in 2022, there was an abnormal decline in Jiangxi's admission ranking, but it recovered in 2023, with limited impact on subsequent application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Geography A+, Marxist Theory A+, Mathematics A, Statistics A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength and strong attraction to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In terms of major popularity in 2026, majors such as Artificial Intelligence, Statistics, and Psychology have high social popularity; the total number of candidates in Jiangxi in 2026 is about 474,900, slightly increased from the total of about 472,480 in 2025 (History + Physics categories), leading to slightly intensified competition; the provincial control line for 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 429 points, and the special type enrollment control line is 505 points, both decreased compared to 2024, reflecting changes in exam difficulty or line adjustment; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, with strong regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Jiangxi is moderate (about 46–50 people), with no significant local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant decline in 2025 rankings (including the pull-down by niche major groups), the 8.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, the university's top level and stable reputation, and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi, a small upward adjustment is made after the abnormal low point in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 Science/Physics Category is about 11386, with a range of 10886–11886.

- Psychology (including Psychology, Psychology <Liyun Experimental Class>)
- Statistics (including Economics + Statistics Dual Degree Program)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (including Zhuoshi Plan Experimental Class)
- Physics (Physics, Astronomy)
- Economics (Liyun Experimental Class)
- Finance/Financial Technology

- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Biotechnology, Ecology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Environmental Science, Environmental Ecological Engineering)
- Geographical Sciences (Physical Geography and Resource Environment, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, Geographic Information Science)
- International Economics and Trade
- Politics, Economics and Philosophy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10886–11886, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safety options. In Tier 1, the Liyun Experimental Class, Psychology, Statistics and other flagship majors are highly competitive, with historical rankings mostly in the 2000–4000 range, far exceeding the predicted range, only suitable for candidates with extremely good rankings to attempt. In Tier 2, majors such as Mathematics, Physics, Economics, Finance, and Computer Science have rankings around 4000–5500, with a gap from the predicted range, but after the overall ranking decline in 2025, some majors may present opportunities. In Tier 3, majors such as Chemistry, Environment, and Geography have relatively lower historical rankings, suitable for safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 281 → 317 → 334 → 469 → 535, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 254 places in the past 5 years and about 201 places in the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 535. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Jiangxi Province: 26 in 2021, 26 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 28 in 2024, 29 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 25, a reduction of about 13.8% compared to 2025, which intensifies competition and tends to decrease the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 19th (Top 20) in the 2026 main list of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, a top national comprehensive normal university with profound liberal arts heritage; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 37th (relatively hot), with moderate attention; in 2022, there was an abnormal admission ranking in Jiangxi Province (score drop), but it was a short-term fluctuation and has since recovered; liberal arts-related A+ disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Education A+, Marxist Theory A+, Psychology A+, etc., with top national disciplinary strength, extremely attractive to high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the popularity of traditional liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Law, and Education is stable; the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province in 2026 is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025; the provincial control line for history category in 2025 is 486 for undergraduate batch and 539 for special types of enrollment control line, up from 463 for undergraduate batch and 532 for special types of enrollment control line in 2024, reflecting intensified competition in liberal arts; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, which has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates in Jiangxi Province; the university's enrollment scale for liberal arts in Jiangxi Province is small (about 25–29 people), with high concentration of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the approximately 13.8% enrollment reduction in 2026, the increase in provincial control lines reflecting intensified competition in liberal arts, the university's top tier and disciplinary advantages, etc., the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category in 2026 is approximately 491, with a range of 432–550.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 432–550, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. For Tier 1, the Liyun Experimental Class, Chinese Language and Literature, and Law Excellent Class have historical rankings mostly in the 170–260 range, requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower limit of the range to attempt. For Tier 2, Education, Communication, History and other majors have rankings around 200–500, which match the predicted range well. For Tier 3, Philosophy, Public Administration, English and other majors have historical rankings mostly in the 250–535 range, suitable for safety. The new Accounting major in 2026 is worth attention.
